# MuleSoft MuleSoft Vectors Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of MuleSoft Vectors Connector documentation.
> See [MuleSoft Vectors Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the MuleSoft Vectors Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring Embedding Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/configuring-embedding-operations.md)
- [Configuring Store Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/configuring-store-operations.md)
- [Configuring Transform Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/configuring-transform-operations.md)
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/index.md)
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-additional-config.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure MuleSoft Vectors Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-connector-config-acb.md)
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-connector-examples.md)
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure MuleSoft Vectors Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-connector-studio.md)
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector 1.1.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-vectors-connector/latest/mulesoft-vectors-connector-xml-maven.md)
